title: Quik's Human Guard Villagers
description: Gives Guard Villagers player models and texture variations per biome. Tons of variety; each guard in a village will look unique while maintaining their biome identity! (Fresh Animations)
body:
### REQUIRES ETF / EMF or OPTIFINE and GUARD VILLAGERS mod

This resource pack gives guard villagers the human models of Human Era Villagers and biome-dependent textures with variants. Recommended with HEVI and Fresh Animations, though a non-FA version is coming soon.

![A couple guards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/376a736b69734248d727f1070c0e0259601a3bec.png)





<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

- BetaTestMCNuggets for the base Human Era models and parts of the textures
- Heavily modified parts of various skins from skindex:
- Taiga guard base - finnanut
- Vanilla villager bases - Silvernatural
- Desert guard wrap base - LeSting
- Desert guard helmet base - Mattallamune72
- Plains guard plate - thatonedaw
- Desert guard fullmask - GoatChest
- Savanna guard wrap - kvtty
- Wandering trader - RedneckCenturion
- Jungle robes - PixelsWardrobe
- Taiga armor - operamc
- Taiga cloak - OneWeirdDonut
- Tundra mask - Dponcio115
- Tundra fur coat - WizenStaff

</details>
